seo.title: Zuo Group | Zhijun Zuo Research Group | Northwest University Organic Chemistry
seo.description: Zuo Group at Northwest University develops new catalytic strategies for selective bond formation in organic synthesis, with interests in photoredox catalysis, radical chemistry, and asymmetric metal catalysis.
seo.keywords: Zhijun Zuo, Zuo Group, Northwest University organic chemistry, photoredox catalysis, radical chemistry, asymmetric metal catalysis, organic synthesis methodology

hero.title: Zhijun Zuo Research Group
hero.statement: Photoredox, radical, and asymmetric metal catalysis in synthesis.
hero.copy: We develop new catalytic strategies for selective bond formation in organic synthesis.

focus.imageAlt: Visible-light-promoted activation of inert C-H, C-C, and C-F bonds
focus.text: The group develops visible-light-promoted catalytic strategies for the activation and transformation of inert C-H, C-C, and C-F bonds. These studies combine photoredox catalysis, radical chemistry, and asymmetric metal catalysis to enable selective bond construction under mild conditions.
